http.cookies/BaseCookie.name: BaseCookie
http.cookies/BaseCookie.description: This class is a dictionary-like object whose keys are strings and whose values are Morsel instances. Note that upon setting a key to a value, the value is first converted to a Morsel containing the key and the value. If input is given, it is passed to the load() method.
